text: MEMORY CORRUPTION: Calling code is leaking an activity thread-watcher and releasing it on another thread
Caught SQLITE error during DB write, HR:
SELECT AccessGUID From PackagedUsageHistory WHERE ID=?;
SELECT AccessGUID FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory WHERE ID=?;

SELECT PackageFamilyName, MAX(LastUsedTimeStart), group_concat(ID) FROM PackagedUsageHistory WHERE UserSid=? AND Capability=? AND AccessBlocked=0 AND LastUsedTimeStart>? AND Label=? GROUP BY PackageFamilyName;

SELECT BinaryFullPath, MAX(LastUsedTimeStart), group_concat(ID) FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory WHERE UserSid=? AND Capability=? AND AccessBlocked=0 AND LastUsedTimeStart>? AND Label=? GROUP BY BinaryFullPath;
SELECT DISTINCT ID FROM NonPackagedGlobalPromptHistory WHERE Capability=? AND ( FileID=? OR ProgramID=? ) AND UserSid=?;
SELECT DISTINCT ID FROM NonPackagedGlobalPromptHistory WHERE Capability=? AND ( FileID=? AND ProgramID=? ) AND UserSid=?;
INSERT INTO NonPackagedGlobalPromptHistory(ShownTime, Capability, FileID, ProgramID, UserSid) VALUES(?,?,?,?,?);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS %s(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,StringValue TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS NonPackagedGlobalPromptHistory(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,ShownTime INTEGER NOT NULL,Capability INTEGER NOT NULL,FileID INTEGER NOT NULL,ProgramID INTEGER NOT NULL,UserSid INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS NonPackagedGlobalPromptHistory(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,ShownTime INTEGER NOT NULL,Capability INTEGER NOT NULL,FileID INTEGER NOT NULL,ProgramID INTEGER NOT NULL,UserSid INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS NonPackagedIdentityRelationship(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,BinaryFullPath INTEGER NOT NULL,FileID INTEGER NOT NULL,ProgramID INTEGER NOT NULL,LastObservedTime INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS PackagedUsageHistory(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStart INTEGER NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStop INTEGER NOT NULL,AccessBlocked INTEGER NOT NULL,Capability INTEGER NOT NULL,PackageFamilyName INTEGER NOT NULL,UserSid INTEGER NOT NULL,AccessGUID INTEGER NOT NULL,Label INTEGER NOT NULL,AppName INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS NonPackagedUsageHistory(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStart INTEGER NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStop INTEGER NOT NULL,AccessBlocked INTEGER NOT NULL,Capability INTEGER NOT NULL,FileID INTEGER NOT NULL,ProgramID INTEGER NOT NULL,BinaryFullPath INTEGER NOT NULL,UserSid INTEGER NOT NULL,AppName INTEGER NOT NULL,ServiceName INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',AccessGUID INTEGER NOT NULL,Label INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory WHERE UserSid=? AND Capability=? AND BinaryFullPath=? AND LastUsedTimeStart>?;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PackagedUsageHistory WHERE UserSid=? AND Capability=? AND PackageFamilyName=? AND LastUsedTimeStart>?;
UPDATE PackagedUsageHistory SET Label=? WHERE ID=?;
UPDATE NonPackagedUsageHistory SET Label=? WHERE ID=?;
SELECT PackageFamilyName, AccessGUID FROM PackagedUsageHistory WHERE ID=?;
SELECT FileID, ProgramID, BinaryFullPath, AccessGUID FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory WHERE ID=?;

SELECT DISTINCT ID, LastUsedTimeStart, PackageFamilyName, AppName FROM PackagedUsageHistory WHERE UserSid=? AND Capability=? AND AccessBlocked=0 AND LastUsedTimeStart>? ORDER BY LastUsedTimeStop DESC, ID;

SELECT DISTINCT ID, LastUsedTimeStart, PackageFamilyName, AppName FROM PackagedUsageHistory WHERE (UserSid=? OR UserSid=0) AND Capability=? AND AccessBlocked=0 AND LastUsedTimeStart>? ORDER BY LastUsedTimeStop DESC, ID;

SELECT DISTINCT ID, LastUsedTimeStart, PackageFamilyName, AppName FROM PackagedUsageHistory WHERE UserSid=? AND Capability=? AND AccessBlocked=1 AND LastUsedTimeStop>? ORDER BY LastUsedTimeStop DESC, ID;

SELECT DISTINCT ID, LastUsedTimeStart, BinaryFullPath, AppName FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory WHERE UserSid=? AND Capability=? AND AccessBlocked=0 AND LastUsedTimeStart>? ORDER BY LastUsedTimeStop DESC, ID;

SELECT DISTINCT ID, LastUsedTimeStart, BinaryFullPath, AppName FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory WHERE (UserSid=? OR UserSid=0) AND Capability=? AND AccessBlocked=0 AND LastUsedTimeStart>? ORDER BY LastUsedTimeStop DESC, ID;

SELECT DISTINCT ID, LastUsedTimeStart, BinaryFullPath, AppName FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory WHERE UserSid=? AND Capability=? AND AccessBlocked=1 AND LastUsedTimeStop>? ORDER BY LastUsedTimeStop DESC, ID;
INSERT INTO PackagedUsageHistory(LastUsedTimeStart, LastUsedTimeStop, AccessBlocked, Capability, PackageFamilyName, UserSid, AccessGUID, Label, AppName) VALUES(?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?);
INSERT INTO NonPackagedIdentityRelationship(BinaryFullPath, FileID, ProgramID, LastObservedTime) VALUES(?,?,?,?);
UPDATE NonPackagedIdentityRelationship SET LastObservedTime=? WHERE BinaryFullPath=? AND FileID=? AND ProgramID=?;
SELECT 1 FROM NonPackagedIdentityRelationship WHERE FileID=? AND BinaryFullPath=?;

INSERT INTO NonPackagedUsageHistory(LastUsedTimeStart, LastUsedTimeStop, AccessBlocked, Capability, FileID, ProgramID, BinaryFullPath, UserSid, AppName, ServiceName, AccessGUID, Label) VALUES(?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?);
SELECT DISTINCT PackageFamilyName FROM PackagedUsageHistory WHERE PackageFamilyName!=0 AND Capability=? AND (UserSid=? OR UserSid=0);
SELECT DISTINCT PackageFamilyName FROM PackagedUsageHistory WHERE PackageFamilyName!=0 AND (UserSid=? OR UserSid=0);
SELECT MAX(LastObservedTime), ProgramID, BinaryFullPath FROM NonPackagedIdentityRelationship  WHERE FileID=?;
SELECT MAX(LastObservedTime), ProgramID, BinaryFullPath FROM NonPackagedIdentityRelationship  WHERE FileID=?;
SELECT DISTINCT FileID FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory WHERE FileID!=0 AND Capability=? AND (UserSid=? OR UserSid=0);
SELECT DISTINCT FileID FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory WHERE FileID!=0 AND (UserSid=? OR UserSid=0);
DELETE FROM ServiceNames WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory);
DELETE FROM AppNames WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT AppName FROM PackagedUsageHistory UNION SELECT DISTINCT AppName FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory);
DELETE FROM AccessGUIDs WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT AccessGUID FROM PackagedUsageHistory UNION SELECT DISTINCT AccessGUID FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory);

DELETE FROM Capabilities WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Capability FROM PackagedUsageHistory UNION SELECT DISTINCT Capability FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory UNION SELECT DISTINCT Capability FROM NonPackagedGlobalPromptHistory);

DELETE FROM Users WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT UserSid FROM PackagedUsageHistory UNION SELECT DISTINCT UserSid FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory UNION SELECT DISTINCT UserSid FROM NonPackagedGlobalPromptHistory);
DELETE FROM BinaryFullPaths WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT BinaryFullPath FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory UNION SELECT DISTINCT BinaryFullPath FROM NonPackagedIdentityRelationship);

DELETE FROM ProgramIDs WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ProgramID FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory UNION SELECT DISTINCT ProgramID FROM NonPackagedIdentityRelationship UNION SELECT DISTINCT ProgramID FROM NonPackagedGlobalPromptHistory);
DELETE FROM NonPackagedIdentityRelationship WHERE FileID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ID FROM FileIDs);
DELETE FROM FileIDs WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT FileID FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory UNION SELECT DISTINCT FileID FROM NonPackagedGlobalPromptHistory);
DELETE FROM PackageFamilyNames WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT PackageFamilyName FROM PackagedUsageHistory);

CREATE TABLE PackagedUsageHistory2(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStart INTEGER NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStop INTEGER NOT NULL,AccessBlocked INTEGER NOT NULL,Capability INTEGER NOT NULL,PackageFamilyName INTEGER NOT NULL,UserSid INTEGER NOT NULL,AccessGUID INTEGER NOT NULL,Label INTEGER NOT NULL,AppName INTEGER NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE NonPackagedUsageHistory RENAME COLUMN AppSessionGUID TO AccessGUID;
ALTER TABLE PackagedUsageHistory RENAME COLUMN AppSessionGUID TO AccessGUID;

CREATE TABLE NonPackagedGlobalPromptHistory(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,ShownTime INTEGER NOT NULL,Capability INTEGER NOT NULL,FileID INTEGER NOT NULL,ProgramID INTEGER NOT NULL,UserSid INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE NonPackagedUsageHistory2(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStart INTEGER NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStop INTEGER NOT NULL,AccessBlocked INTEGER NOT NULL,Capability INTEGER NOT NULL,FileID INTEGER NOT NULL,ProgramID INTEGER NOT NULL,BinaryFullPath INTEGER NOT NULL,UserSid INTEGER NOT NULL,AppName INTEGER NOT NULL,ServiceName INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',AppSessionGUID INTEGER NOT NULL,Label INTEGER NOT NULL);

UPDATE NonPackagedUsageHistory SET AppSessionGUID = (SELECT AppSessionGUID FROM AnnotatedUsageHistory WHERE NonPackagedUsageHistory.ID = UsageHistoryID AND AppType = 1), Label = (SELECT Label FROM AnnotatedUsageHistory WHERE NonPackagedUsageHistory.ID = UsageHistoryID AND AppType = 1) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT AppSessionGUID FROM AnnotatedUsageHistory WHERE NonPackagedUsageHistory.ID = UsageHistoryID AND AppType = 1);

CREATE TABLE PackagedUsageHistory2(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStart INTEGER NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStop INTEGER NOT NULL,AccessBlocked INTEGER NOT NULL,Capability INTEGER NOT NULL,PackageFamilyName INTEGER NOT NULL,UserSid INTEGER NOT NULL,AppSessionGUID INTEGER NOT NULL,Label INTEGER NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE PackagedUsageHistory2 RENAME TO PackagedUsageHistory;
ALTER TABLE PackagedUsageHistory2 RENAME TO PackagedUsageHistory;

UPDATE PackagedUsageHistory SET AppSessionGUID = (SELECT AppSessionGUID FROM AnnotatedUsageHistory WHERE PackagedUsageHistory.ID = UsageHistoryID AND AppType = 0), Label = (SELECT Label FROM AnnotatedUsageHistory WHERE PackagedUsageHistory.ID = UsageHistoryID AND AppType = 0) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT AppSessionGUID FROM AnnotatedUsageHistory WHERE PackagedUsageHistory.ID = UsageHistoryID AND AppType = 0);

CREATE TABLE NonPackagedUsageHistory2(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStart INTEGER NOT NULL,LastUsedTimeStop INTEGER NOT NULL,AccessBlocked INTEGER NOT NULL,Capability INTEGER NOT NULL,FileID INTEGER NOT NULL,ProgramID INTEGER NOT NULL,BinaryFullPath INTEGER NOT NULL,UserSid INTEGER NOT NULL,AppName INTEGER NOT NULL,ServiceName INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT '0');
ALTER TABLE NonPackagedUsageHistory ADD COLUMN ServiceName INTEGER DEFAULT '0';
ALTER TABLE NonPackagedUsageHistory2 RENAME TO NonPackagedUsageHistory;
ALTER TABLE NonPackagedUsageHistory2 RENAME TO NonPackagedUsageHistory;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS AnnotatedUsageHistory(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,AppType INTEGER NOT NULL,UsageHistoryID INTEGER NOT NULL,AppSessionGUID INTEGER NOT NULL,Label INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT LastUsedTimeStart, LastUsedTimeStop, AccessBlocked, UserSid FROM PackagedUsageHistory WHERE PackageFamilyName=? AND Capability=? AND (UserSid=? OR UserSid=0) AND LastUsedTimeStop>?;
SELECT LastUsedTimeStart, LastUsedTimeStop, AccessBlocked, UserSid FROM NonPackagedUsageHistory WHERE FileID=? AND Capability=? AND (UserSid=? OR UserSid=0) AND LastUsedTimeStop>?;
